resources.string: View third-party open-source libraries and their licenses
The app is currently the default package installer
The app is running as the system package installer
Do not make use of any privilege, Unknown Sources permission is required to install apps

Set this app as the default package installer to take over most installation requests. Note that the following cases cannot be intercepted:
- OEM restricts modifying the default installer
- The initiator specifies a target Component
- The initiator uses a Session Install
Enable this if you have forced the default installer takeover via a third-party LSPosed module. This disables internal status checking, and the home page will constantly show as "Activated"
Please grant permission to access Sui or Shizuku
Please grant permission to access Dhizuku
Installation and uninstallation records will appear here after an operation finishes.
All installation and uninstallation records will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
Check for software updates and new features
Get update directly from GitHub and install, no cache will be left
Check for source code on GitHub
Save log to local file for debugging purposes
After uninstalling this app, you will no longer be able to use InstallerX Revived to install apps.
Please enable notification permission to install!
Please enable All Files Access to install!
Change the theme of the app
Customize theme colors in Miuix theme style
Display a floating style navigation bar at the bottom of the screen
Current palette style only supports Spec 2021
The installation dialog will no longer follow the app’s theme colors. Instead, it will use colors extracted from the icon of the package being installed
The progress segment of the live activity will use colors extracted from the icon of the package
Prefer system icon for app to install
Attempt to get icon from system, useful when using icon packs. Disable to show icon from installation package
Select the animation effect for predictive back
Select the exit direction for predictive back
Please make sure you can access this page before hiding launcher icon!
For HyperOS, please allow "Autostart" and "Open new windows while running in the background" to receive dialer code!
Change the global settings of the installer
Change the global settings of the uninstaller
Analyze APK signatures before installation and compare them with installed apps
Show info for normal signature states
Show signature notices for matching signatures and new installs
Show certificate summaries, verified schemes, warnings, and errors in signature notices
Detect and show Xposed module info during installation
Show \"Open LSPosed\" button after installing Xposed module
Require biometric auth when installing packages
Background when long clicking the install button
Completely disable biometric authentication for every installs
Enable and allow the use of biometric authentication for every installs
Follow profile settings set for each app
Are you sure you want to change this setting
To continue, please confirm this action using your device authentication
Clear install success notification after %d seconds
Save profiles and app settings to a backup file
Replace current profiles and app settings from a backup file
Current profiles and app settings will be replaced by the selected backup.
This backup contains %1$d profiles, %2$d scopes, %3$d settings, and %4$d history records. Current profiles and app settings will be replaced.
The selected file is not a valid InstallerX Revived backup.
Unsupported backup format version %1$s. Current version supports up to %2$s.
The backup does not contain profiles, scopes, settings, or history records.
This backup was created by a newer app version: %1$s.
This backup uses a newer database schema: %1$s. Current schema is %2$s.
Scope has no matching profile and will be ignored: %1$s
Setting is unsupported or has an invalid value and will be ignored: %1$s
Disable ADB install verification, useful on some systems where a installation will trigger an scan (Play Protect)
Useful on ROMs with strict background policies. If the notification gets stuck, try ignoring battery optimization
Automatically set this app as installer when starting a new install
Set InstallerX as the default app to install apks
Unset InstallerX as the default installer to install apks
When the authorizer selected by the profile is unavailable, try enabled authorizers in order
Apply Android PackageInstaller source permission and user restriction checks before installing. Not available for Dhizuku or no-privilege installs
Select and sort fallback authorizers.\nSelected authorization order: %1$s
Select at least one item. Drag to sort.
Running as system package installer, most of the options are not needed.
When not using privileges, most of the options are invalid.
When working as system package installer, always use root for some privileged operations, such as flashing modules and deleting files
Silently approve session install requests from target apps
Unavailable when Respect platform policy is enabled
Enabling this switch allows apps within this profile\'s scope to silently install apps without explicit user authorization. Enable it with caution.
Controls whether to show toast after install
Specify the install reason for newly installed apps. Selecting "User" usually lets the launcher create a desktop icon.
When Respect platform policy is enabled, defaults to User
Specify the source of the package, Local File or Download File will face more restrictions
When Respect platform policy is enabled, filled automatically from the source
Use a custom installed package as the install requester
The entered package name must be installed
Defaults to this app\'s package name
Manually set the user you want to install app to
Manually trigger the dex2oat process after installation
Force recompilation even if the system deems it unnecessary
Automatically delete the apk after it\'s been installed
In addition to deleting the installation package, also delete the compressed file containing the installation package.
Show target and min information on the installation interface
Show extra infos if is module
Show package size on the installation interface
Configure installation parameters such as source, user
Apps prohibited from installation by package name
Apps prohibited from installation by SharedUID
No apps prohibited from installation by packageName
No apps prohibited from installation by sharedUID
Exemptions that only target SharedUID; if it is forbidden by package name, it still cannot be installed.
Do you want to delete \'%1$s\'? This cannot be undone.
The first profile is the default, no manual selection needed. New profile can be set to specific apps for installations they initiate.
Please authenticate to confirm this operation
You are doing an install operation, To continue, please confirm this action using your device authentication
You are doing an uninstall operation, To continue, please confirm this action using your device authentication
Re-select the APK splits to install
Select which applications to install from the ZIP
Please select at least one package
This app will run in 32-bit mode. This may increase memory usage or reduce performance on 64-bit devices
The app architecture (%1$s) does not match your device (%2$s). It will run via translation. Installation or execution is not guaranteed, and issues like overheating or crashes may occur
This package is identical to the installed app. You can safely skip this installation.
System SDK lower than app requires
This is a downgrade, which may cause data loss or app instability
Are you sure you want to install?
New install. No installed app with the same package name was found.
Signature match. The current package uses the same signer set as the installed app.
Signature rotation compatible. The current package certificate exists in the installed app signing certificate lineage. Final update compatibility is decided by the system.
Signing rotation proof detected, but compatibility with the installed app could not be confirmed. Final result depends on system verification.
Signature mismatch! Continuing installation may cause data loss or security risks.
Unable to verify app signature, please proceed with caution.
APK signature analysis found issues. Installation may fail; final result depends on system verification.
Splits signed differently from base or installed app
Cannot add the selected split package to an uninstalled app
Only split APKs are selected. They will be added to the existing application
These settings are temporary for this session. To keep them, go to Settings
This app is usually updated by %1$s. If you update it from another source, your phone may receive future updates from any source. App functionality may change.
Allow %1$s to pre-approve installing this app?
Foreground service notification, tap to disable
Show install progress as live update
Parsing installable content from the input…
Uninstaller always use authorizer set in default profile
App data and cache will be retained
Uninstall this app for all users on this device
Uninstall for all users was disabled
Allow deleting system apps for current user
Uninstall this archived app entry from this device
Uninstall app by given package name
This link does not contain a valid file
Permission denied due to package visibility restrictions. The app requesting the installation is hidden from InstallerX. If you are using modules like \'Hide My Applist\', please allowlist InstallerX
This version cannot access Internet, to use this feature, reinstall another version
This app version is already installed, please uninstall and try again
You don\'t allow installation of the app!
Profile blocks installing apps with a different signature
Profile blocks installing apps whose signature cannot be verified
Invalid APK (package corrupted). Please redownload and try again
Storage full, try clearing some space
An app with the same package name already exists
The base.apk with a matching UID couldn\'t be found, please download it and try again
Update incompatible, please uninstall and try again
Please grant install unknown apps permission and try again
The system version is too old, please upgrade the system
A ContentProvider with the same name exists
The package is too old for the system version
Installing debug applications is disabled, enable it and try again
CPU ABI incompatible, please download the package that supports the current CPU
The package uses an invalid feature
Failed to access the SD card
The calling program expects the wrapper of the call to change
The UID has changed, please uninstall and try again
Downgrade failed, please uninstall the app and try again
Permission model downgrade is not allowed
Sandbox version downgrade is not allowed
targetSDK too low, to proceed, enable corresponding flag
Please log in to the original Google account
Please add a valid install source for installing vivo system app
Please add a valid install source for installing mi system app
The package is trying to redeclare permission already declared by another app!
Non-preloaded apps are forbidden from using the system shared UID
Manifest has no application or instrumentation tags
The package was skipped and should be ignored
Permission group already defined by another package
Invalid permission group or incompatible certificate
Requesting user pre-approval is currently unavailable
Packaged native code did not match all of the natively ABIs supported by the system
System restricted install through USB, please enable it
HyperOS does not allow uninstalling this app!
Uninstallation blocked because the app is used as a shared library
Uninstallation blocked because the app is pinned
Please activate Sui or Shizuku and grant permission
Please activate Dhizuku and grant permission
Failed to open zip as file
Show version compare in single line
Show version compare in single line in install dialog
Show SDK compare in multi lines
Show SDK compare in multi lines in install dialog
Always show both old and new values
Show identical data as a single value
Show more options in the install dialog
Expand temporary settings when opening the install dialog
Start install in background when pressing install button
Dismissing the dialog will cancel the installation instead of minimizing it to the notifications
In the absence of privileges, some CN customized systems will intercept the associated startup. Modifying this value can increase the reaction time when the system intercept pop-up remains.
Show smart suggestions on install failure
List of permissions requested by the package being installed
Analyse and show some specific value for oem apk(s) on install dialog
If the package being installed is a test-only app, allow it to be installed
Force the package to be installed to internal storage
Force the package to be installed to external storage
Tells the system that the install request was made by ADB
Install the package for all users on the system, instead of just the specified or default user
Attempts to downgrade the currently-installed version of the package (Android 15+ need ROOT)

Automatically grant all permissions the package is requesting. Note that this only applies to runtime permissions. Special permissions like All Files Access or Accessibility won\'t be automatically granted
Select all splits by default instead of selecting best suitable
Select all APKs by default during batch install
Select all APKs by default for multiple-file sessions.
Install the package as an instant app
Used when installing a feature for a split app to prevent the main app from being killed during install
Indicates that the package being installed is a full app, can be used to upgrade instant apps to full apps
Indicates that the package is \"critical to system health or security\" and will more aggressively delete clearable files to make space if needed
Indicates that the package is a virtual preload
Indicates that the package being installed is an APEX package
Allow future rollbacks of this package
Disables package verification during install. This is not signature verification
Indicates this package is being installed as part of a staged install
Don\'t check whether the installed APEX can be updated
Allows apps targeting old SDK versions to be installed
Block installing apps that have a different signature than the installed version
Block installing apps whose signature cannot be verified
Verify the package, but don\'t install it
Set this installer as the source for future updates
This file contains multiple separate applications, please select the applications you want to install
Please select the applications you want to install
Please click on the notification to select items to install
This file contains both a module and applications. Choose how to install
Select file type you want to install
Please click on the notification to select the installation type
Cannot install apps and modules simultaneously in batch
Cannot install multiple modules in batch
This will uninstall the current version of the app and try to install the new one
Uninstall old, keep data and retry
This will uninstall the current version of the app while keeping its data, then try to install the new one
This will uninstall the current version of the app while keeping its data, then try to install the new one. DO NOT use on system app!
This will uninstall the current version of the app and try to install the new one. DO NOT use on system app!
Temporarily add valid installer and retry
Retry using shizuku and valid installer
Go to Developer options to enable USB installation
Temporarily allow bypassing restrictions and retry
Temporarily bypass profile restriction and retry
Open Android settings to allow this app to request package installs
Experimental features in the lab may be unstable or risky and could change or be removed at any time. Use at your own risk
Always check twice before flashing any modules!
Display InstallerX ASCII art when installation starts"
Display the file path in app details
Display which app started the installation
Attempt to update apps without user confirmation. Enabling this option may completely prevent installation on systems where OEMs have broken PackageInstaller APIs
Sets the XMSF network block duration. Only applies to Shizuku. Modify only if you understand the consequences!
Tap icon on the prepare page to share installation packages
Customize the appearance of installation progress notifications
Bypass verification restriction for Mi Island
Add a system-app-style glow effect to the edge of Super Island
Customize the appearance and behavior of installation dialog

This section detects all authorization methods available for this app and lets you choose the default one used for privileged operations. It only checks availability here; any required permission will be requested when the app actually needs to use it.

This setting controls the authorizer used by the app itself for privileged operations. Installation profiles control the authorizer used when installing apps, and can override this global setting for that purpose.
Learn how to configure and use InstallerX Revived
Additional action is required before this app can be restored
Free at least %1$s, then try restoring again
Connect to the internet, then try restoring again
Enable %1$s to restore this archived app
%1$s is no longer installed and cannot restore this app
The archived app could not be restored
Another installation is already in progress. Wait for it to finish, then try again.
